name: Calzone
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound dry hot sausage or soppressata, thinly sliced
options: steamed broccoli -- caramelized onions -- sundried tomatoes, prosciutto, olives, tomato sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425 degrees F.
2. Place clean pizza stone in oven to preheat.
3. Dust a clean work surface lightly with flour.
4. Take the first of four rounds of dough and flatten it with fingers and palms until about 1/8 inch to 1/4 inch thick and oval-shaped.
5. Place half a cup of ricotta cheese and one-quarter of the dry sausage in the upper part of the center of the rolled dough.
6. Fold the dough to form a half moon shape, then seal the edges.
7. Repeat steps 4-6 with the remaining three pieces of dough.
8. Place the calzones on the stone in the oven and cook until dark golden brown, about 10 to 12 minutes.
9. Remove from oven and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
